creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks, indeed, I've been missing recent minor 0.9.x releases, and portscout did not notify me about them. :-(

Unfortunately, Reini Urban, the author of LibreDWG, had only uploaded quite large .tar.gz distfile this time, not the usually accompanying .tar.xz one.  I've pinged him so he can correct the omission.  I believe it's a minor issue that could be resolved fast enough to postpone the update a bit.
